title: cynoglossum lanceolatum
intro: Cynoglossum lanceolatum, also known as the forked bittersweet or Chinese forget-me-not, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum lanceolatum are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Cynoglossum lanceolatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried extract, making it accessible in various forms for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
